runtime.description: The execution environment. Known values: web, desktop, cli, mcp, pdf, api. Free-form string — new runtimes do not require a spec change.

display.description: Where inside the runtime the view is rendered. Known values: tree-node, detail-panel, modal, preview, embed, fullscreen. Free-form string.

capabilities.description: What the runtime supports. Exploratory — expected to evolve through use. Examples: ["react", "css", "images"], ["markdown"], ["ansi-colour"].
